Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime.ManifestFile

Packages that use ManifestFile
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice that return ManifestFile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ManifestFile
    Microservice.getManifest()
    Returns the main jar manifest file contents as a simple JsonMap.

  • Uses of ManifestFile in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management that return ManifestFile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ManifestFile
    InfoManager.resolveManifest(RestContext context)
    Resolves the application's ManifestFile from the host context's bean store.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management with parameters of type ManifestFile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JsonMap
    InfoManager.getInfo(ManifestFile manifest)
    Renders the manifest's main attributes (build/version/git metadata) as a sorted map.
